touches.ai_summary: Cold call attempt to Henry White at ArcExchange. No answer, left voicemail introducing our sales automation platform.
Follow-up email sent to Henry White highlighting rep productivity challenges in healthcare IT sales teams. No response received.
Second email sent with case study showing 34% productivity increase for similar-sized healthcare tech company. No response.
Email referencing recent ArcExchange growth and potential scaling challenges for their sales team. No response received.
LinkedIn connection request sent with brief note about helping healthcare IT sales teams scale efficiently. Not accepted.
Email highlighting automation capabilities that reduce manual forecasting work. No response from Henry.
Second cold call attempt. No answer, left brief voicemail referencing previous emails and offering 15-minute intro call.
Final outreach email offering specific time slots for quick conversation about rep productivity challenges. No response.
LinkedIn message with link to recent webinar on sales automation ROI in SMB environments. No response.

Henry responded to follow-up email expressing interest in learning more about automation capabilities for his 11-person sales team. Mentioned current challenges with manual pipeline tracking and asked about implementation timeline.

questions_asked.question: How long does typical implementation take for a team our size?
questions_asked.answer: Usually 2-3 weeks for full onboarding with our automations package, including training and customization.

next_steps: Schedule discovery call to understand current workflow and pain points

touches.ai_summary: Henry confirmed discovery call scheduled. Brief email exchange clarifying he wants to focus on forecast accuracy and reducing time spent on pipeline reviews. Asked about integration with their current CRM.

questions_asked.question: Do you integrate with Salesforce? That's our current CRM.
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have native Salesforce integration with bi-directional sync for all opportunity and activity data.

next_steps: Prepare discovery call focused on forecasting and pipeline management
Share integration documentation ahead of call

touches.ai_summary: Proposal call with Henry covering platform capabilities and pricing. He expressed strong interest in automation features and consulting package. Mentioned they're also evaluating Clari but likes our approach to rep productivity better. Asked about discount options for multi-year commitment.

questions_asked.question: What's included in the consulting package versus just the automations tier?
questions_asked.answer: Consulting adds dedicated CSM, quarterly business reviews, custom workflow design, and priority support. Great fit for teams wanting hands-on guidance.

questions_asked.question: When are you looking to have a solution in place?
questions_asked.answer: Ideally next quarter. Our Q2 forecast process has been painful and we want something better by Q3.

next_steps: Send formal proposal with pricing for 11 seats
Include ROI calculator based on their team size

touches.ai_summary: Pricing discussion with Henry. He pushed back on list price, mentioned Clari came in lower. Requested 30% discount to get approval from his side. We offered 31% off to close this quarter. Henry seemed satisfied but mentioned he needs to run it by finance before final commitment. No other executives mentioned in approval chain.

questions_asked.question: Can you match Clari's pricing? They quoted us about $5,500 for similar features.
questions_asked.answer: We can offer 31% off to bring it to $7,600 ACV, which includes our consulting tier that adds significant value beyond basic automation.

questions_asked.question: Besides finance, who else needs to sign off on this purchase?
questions_asked.answer: Just finance review for budget approval. I have authority to make the call on the vendor side.

questions_asked.question: What's your timeline for getting finance approval?
questions_asked.answer: Should be quick, maybe a week. They're pretty responsive for tools under $10k.

next_steps: Follow up next week on approval status

touches.ai_summary: Cold call attempt to Henry White at ArcExchange. No answer, left voicemail introducing our sales automation platform.
Follow-up email sent to Henry White highlighting rep productivity challenges in healthcare IT sales teams. No response received.
LinkedIn message received response from Henry asking for more information about our platform. Brief exchange confirming interest.

questions_asked.question: What makes your platform different for healthcare sales teams?
questions_asked.answer: We specialize in complex B2B sales cycles with built-in compliance tracking and industry-specific playbooks for healthcare IT.

next_steps: Schedule intro call to discuss ArcExchange's specific needs
